primary_rule.definition_string: predict ABSORPTION-regime iff (parent recall-hole > 0.7795); else CO-FIRING-regime

non_hole_survivors.reason_not_a_hole: recall_anchor_selection=0.768 > HOLE_RECALL_MAX=0.6 and not < overall_anchor_recall_selection(0.42162162162162165) - 0.10; is_hole flag stored False
recall_anchor_selection=1.0 > HOLE_RECALL_MAX=0.6 and not < overall_anchor_recall_selection(0.363013698630137) - 0.10; is_hole flag stored False

M3_honest_counting.paper_wording: KG-guided recall-repair yields 30 repair variants (k-track and diagnostic edges) surviving Benjamini-Hochberg FDR<=0.05 out of 69 tested, spanning 22 DISTINCT suppressed-parent recall holes across spelling (13), homograph-taxonomic (3), and numeric (6); 6 sub-contexts contribute two coincident variants (kg_ktrack and kg_diagnostic naming the same latent), and 2 survivors (numeric/percent, L/layer) are not recall holes (the parent anchor already recalls the sub-context on the selection fold), so the distinct-hole count is 22, not 30 (= 30 - 6 double-count-redundant - 2 non-hole).

cross_family_counterexamples.note: spelling 'large' (prec 0.571 -> 802x) beats taxonomic US-4760 (prec 0.709 -> 7.8x): higher precision != higher selectivity across families
toxicity/insult (prec 0.750 -> 2.4x co-firing): single-latent ablation not surgical because sub-attribute co-fires with parent

M4_selectivity.softened_verdict: Absorber precision predicts surgical selectivity as a strong WITHIN-FAMILY observation (taxonomic Spearman rho=0.900, p=0.037); across families the relationship breaks (the spelling 'large' absorber at precision 0.571 reaches 802x, exceeding the taxonomic United-States absorber at precision 0.709 which reaches only 7.8x; all-7 rho=0.679, absorption-6 rho=0.714).
M4_selectivity.paper_wording: Over the n=6 absorption cases (which include the partial-surgical United-States/4760 at 7.8x), surgical selectivity has mean=1452.5x and median=1262.2x; restricting to the n=5 cleanly-surgical cases (SURGICAL_EDIT_CONFIRMED: taxonomic Georgia/16009 1722x, Jordan/540 2722x, Jordan/8347 3247x, United-States/846 214x, first-letter large/8463 802x) gives median=1722.5x. The previously reported '1452x median' is in fact the MEAN of the n=6 absorption set.

code_evidence.snippet:
ctrl_fire   = fire(eval_rows, list(resp_ctrl))          # one column per OTHER content-responsive latent
ctrl_detect = base[:, None] | ctrl_fire                 # anchor OR each SINGLE control latent (per-latent broadcast)
ctrl_recall = ctrl_detect.mean(0)                       # recall of (anchor + that single latent)
ctrl_gain   = ctrl_recall - base_recall                 # DISTRIBUTION: one gain per single-latent addition
rand_detect_perwin = ctrl_detect.mean(1)                # per-window MEAN over single-latent additions
...
pct = float((ctrl_gain < gain_kg).mean())               # percentile of KG gain within single-latent gain dist

M5_control_wording.corrected_wording: The repair control is a RANDOM SINGLE content-responsive-latent addition: each other content-responsive latent (not in the unit) is added individually to the anchor (ctrl_detect = base[:,None] | ctrl_fire is a per-latent broadcast), yielding a DISTRIBUTION of single-latent recall gains (one per latent); the KG-named absorber counts as a repair only if its gain exceeds the 95th/99th percentile of that single-latent-addition distribution (kg_percentile_vs_random = (ctrl_gain < gain_kg).mean()) AND the paired-bootstrap CI of KG-detection minus the per-window MEAN single-latent addition (rand_detect_perwin) excludes 0. No union/any-of/max-pool over the other latents is ever taken.

phrasings_to_drop.phrase: a control that adds every OTHER content-responsive latent (the full random-addition population)
phrasings_to_drop.why_misleading: reads as a UNION/max-pool of all other latents added together; the implemented control adds each other latent INDIVIDUALLY and forms a distribution OF single-latent additions (ctrl_gain is per-latent, ctrl_detect.any(1)/.max(1) never appears).
phrasings_to_drop.fix: say 'the population OF single-latent additions', not 'adds every other latent'.

phrasings_to_drop.why_misleading: invites a (wrong) 'your union baseline trivially wins' objection.
phrasings_to_drop.fix: clarify it is the percentile within the SINGLE-latent-addition gain distribution.

M8_transparency.source_path: D4 art_JMA2gBvnakAm (per_letter), D3 art___vgSpUe6wAF (taxonomic), D1 art_sxwT7hK6YFEA (confident fraction + member_labeling)

paper_table.caption: Auditability-vs-AUC tradeoff (first-letter). The human-auditable compact named unit (anchor + diagnostic-corroborated absorbers) costs AUC -0.056..-0.200 vs the 15-wide max-pool (per-letter bootstrap CIs all exclude 0), yet the named compact structure carries auditable signal: ensemble member-labels agree at 0.730 vs a 0.096 shuffle null (gap 0.634, CI [0.545,0.724]); per-letter confident-label fraction L 0.87 / O 0.80 / T 0.93 / I 0.87 / D 0.67 (absorbers 0.756 vs anchors 0.43).
